source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Rectangle $WXYZ$ is drawn on $\triangle ABC$, such that point $W$ lies on segment $AB$, point $X$ lies on segment $AC$, and points $Y$ and $Z$ lies on segment $BC$, as shown. If $m\angle BWZ=26^{\circ}$ and $m\angle CXY=64^{\circ}$, what is $m\angle BAC$, in degrees? <image1>
